lxcat.message: ATTENTION: downloading in xml format in under development. Do not use this file.

References.Source: LXCat, www.lxcat.net. Generated on 22 Jun 2026. All rights reserved.
References.Reference: - Morgan database, www.lxcat.net, retrieved on June 22, 2026.
- Phelps database, www.lxcat.net, retrieved on June 22, 2026.
Be aware that some databases and solvers can additionally have instructions how to reference corresponding data. Please check below in the headers of databases.

Database.name: Morgan (Kinema Research & Software)
Database.Description: Assembled over the course of 30 years WL Morgan and suitable for use with 2-term Boltzmann solvers.

Group.Description: Cross sections from Shimamura. Some points picked from the original data to represent the curve at E<14 .

Process.Comment: E < 14 eV from Williams; E >= 14 eV from Igor Bray.
E < 14 eV from Williams; E >= 14 eV from Igor Bray.

Group.Description: CAR: 7.35e-3 0.586 0 . These cross sections are the same as those compiled by Phelps with two exception : (1) the rotational excitation suggested by Morgan is lower than that of Phelps and (2) We have added the Phelps' data for the 13.86 eV excitation process to the Morgan database. Morgan's original data didn't include the 13.86 eV excitation process.

Process.Comment: H2 G1SIG V = 2 Excitation (DAY, ANDERSON AND SHARPTON, 79).

Database.name: Phelps database
Database.Description: A compilation of atomic and molecular data, assembled and evaluated by A.V. Phelps and collaborators. Please refer to these data using the sources cited for each gas. We make no claims for these cross sections beyond those stated in the papers where they are published or cited. In most cases these cross sections were assembled in the 1970's and 1980's. In only a few cases have they been modified or tested since that time. I do not plan any updates. Additions have been made when cross sections have been assembled for other purposes. Since the JILA information center was closed by NIST, there is no one there to help you. Opinions expressed are those of AV Phelps and do not imply JILA, CU, or NIST approval.
Database.Contact: A.V. Phelps, Fellow Adjoint of JILA University of Colorado Boulder, CO 80309-0440 e-mail: avp@@jila.colorado.edu

Process.Comment: He+ in He: Phelps, private communication. Qi = 7.63E-20*(Erel)^(-0.5) 7.63E-20*(col(A))^(-0.5).
Xe+ in Xe: Piscitelli et al Phys. Rev. E 68, 046408 (2003). 1.059E-19/col(A)^0.5.
Xe+ in Xe: Piscitelli et al Phys. Rev. E 68, 046408 (2003). 3.39E-19/col(A)^0.5.
